---
title: "14_diagnostic_figures_light_theme"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(forcats)

dir.create(here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Light purple + black theme
#--------------------------------------------------

theme_report <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#E6DFF5", linewidth = 0.35),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = base_size + 4),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "#4B3B66", size = base_size),
      legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"))
}

purple_class <- c(
  "No" = "#111111",
  "Yes" = "#A78BFA")

purple_model <- c(
  "Methylation Random Forest" = "#8B5CF6",
  "Multiomic Random Forest" = "#111111")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Load saved CV predictions
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_preds <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_cv_predictions.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_preds <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_cv_predictions.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

rf_preds <- bind_rows(meth_preds, multi_preds) %>%
  mutate(
    model = recode(
      model,
      "RandomForest" = "Random Forest",
      "ElasticNet" = "Elastic Net")) %>%
  filter(model == "Random Forest") %>%
  mutate(
    model_label = paste(data_source, "Random Forest"),
    obs = factor(obs, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    pred = factor(pred, levels = c("Yes", "No")))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Helper function: confusion matrix plot
#--------------------------------------------------

make_cm_plot <- function(pred_df, model_name, file_name) {
  
  cm <- confusionMatrix(
    data = factor(pred_df$pred, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    reference = factor(pred_df$obs, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    positive = "Yes")
  
  cm_table <- as.data.frame(cm$table)
  names(cm_table) <- c("Predicted", "Actual", "Count")
  
  p <- cm_table %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Count)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = Count),
      colour = "white",
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 7) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = "#C4B5FD",
      high = "#111111") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Confusion matrix:", model_name),
      subtitle = "Default classification threshold; Yes = survival beyond 500 days",
      x = "Actual class",
      y = "Predicted class",
      fill = "Count") +
    theme_report(base_size = 13) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
  
  ggsave(
    here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", file_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300)
  
  list(plot = p, cm = cm)
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Helper function: confusion matrix plot
#--------------------------------------------------

make_cm_plot <- function(pred_df, model_name, file_name) {
  
  cm <- confusionMatrix(
    data = factor(pred_df$pred, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    reference = factor(pred_df$obs, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    positive = "Yes")
  
  cm_table <- as.data.frame(cm$table)
  names(cm_table) <- c("Predicted", "Actual", "Count")
  
  p <- cm_table %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Count)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = Count),
      colour = "white",
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 7) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = "#C4B5FD",
      high = "#111111") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Confusion matrix:", model_name),
      subtitle = "Default classification threshold; Yes = survival beyond 500 days",
      x = "Actual class",
      y = "Predicted class",
      fill = "Count") +
    theme_report(base_size = 13) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
  
  ggsave(
    here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", file_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300)
  
  list(plot = p, cm = cm)
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Confusion matrix: Multiomic RF
#--------------------------------------------------

multi_rf_preds <- rf_preds %>%
  filter(model_label == "Multiomic Random Forest")

multi_cm_out <- make_cm_plot(
  pred_df = multi_rf_preds,
  model_name = "Multiomic Random Forest",
  file_name = "figure_confusion_matrix_multiomic_rf_light_purple.png")

multi_cm_out$plot
multi_cm_out$cm
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Confusion matrix: Methylation RF
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_rf_preds <- rf_preds %>%
  filter(model_label == "Methylation Random Forest")

meth_cm_out <- make_cm_plot(
  pred_df = meth_rf_preds,
  model_name = "Methylation Random Forest",
  file_name = "figure_confusion_matrix_methylation_rf_light_purple.png")

meth_cm_out$plot
meth_cm_out$cm
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Save confusion matrix statistics
#--------------------------------------------------

confusion_stats <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    model = "Multiomic Random Forest",
    accuracy = as.numeric(multi_cm_out$cm$overall["Accuracy"]),
    sensitivity = as.numeric(multi_cm_out$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    specificity = as.numeric(multi_cm_out$cm$byClass["Specificity"])
  ),
  tibble(
    model = "Methylation Random Forest",
    accuracy = as.numeric(meth_cm_out$cm$overall["Accuracy"]),
    sensitivity = as.numeric(meth_cm_out$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    specificity = as.numeric(meth_cm_out$cm$byClass["Specificity"])))

confusion_stats

write_csv(
  confusion_stats,
  here("outputs", "tables", "diagnostic_confusion_stats.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Threshold trade-off data
#--------------------------------------------------

threshold_grid <- seq(0.05, 0.95, by = 0.01)

threshold_metrics <- rf_preds %>%
  select(model_label, obs, Yes) %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    
    map_dfr(threshold_grid, function(thresh) {
      
      pred_class <- ifelse(.x$Yes >= thresh, "Yes", "No")
      
      cm <- confusionMatrix(
        data = factor(pred_class, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
        reference = factor(.x$obs, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
        positive = "Yes")
      
      tibble(
        threshold = thresh,
        sensitivity = as.numeric(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
        specificity = as.numeric(cm$byClass["Specificity"]),
        accuracy = as.numeric(cm$overall["Accuracy"]))
    })
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(
  threshold_metrics,
  here("outputs", "tables", "threshold_tradeoff_metrics.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Figure: threshold trade-off
#--------------------------------------------------

threshold_plot_df <- threshold_metrics %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sensitivity, specificity),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = recode(
      metric,
      sensitivity = "Sensitivity",
      specificity = "Specificity"))

p_threshold <- threshold_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = threshold, y = value, colour = metric, linetype = metric)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ model_label) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 0.5,
    colour = "#4B3B66",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "Sensitivity" = "#8B5CF6",
      "Specificity" = "#111111")) +
  labs(
    title = "Sensitivity and specificity across classification thresholds",
    subtitle = "Dashed line indicates the default 0.5 threshold",
    x = "Probability threshold for predicting survival > 500 days",
    y = "Metric value",
    colour = NULL,
    linetype = NULL) +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_threshold

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_threshold_tradeoff_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_threshold,
  width = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Calibration-style data
#--------------------------------------------------

calibration_df <- rf_preds %>%
  mutate(
    observed_yes = ifelse(obs == "Yes", 1, 0),
    prob_bin = ntile(Yes, 5)) %>%
  group_by(model_label, prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_predicted_prob = mean(Yes, na.rm = TRUE),
    observed_yes_rate = mean(observed_yes, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop")

calibration_df

write_csv(
  calibration_df,
  here("outputs", "tables", "rf_calibration_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 11. Figure: calibration-style plot
#--------------------------------------------------

p_calibration <- calibration_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_predicted_prob, y = observed_yes_rate, colour = model_label)) +
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0,
    slope = 1,
    linetype = "dashed",
    colour = "#999999") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = purple_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Exploratory calibration check",
    subtitle = "Observed survival rate by predicted probability quintile",
    x = "Mean predicted probability of survival > 500 days",
    y = "Observed proportion surviving > 500 days",
    colour = "Model") +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_calibration

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_calibration_check_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_calibration,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 12. Save diagnostic figure manifest
#--------------------------------------------------

diagnostic_figure_manifest <- tibble(
  figure = c(
    "Confusion matrix: Multiomic RF",
    "Confusion matrix: Methylation RF",
    "Threshold trade-off",
    "Calibration check"),
  file = c(
    "figure_confusion_matrix_multiomic_rf_light_purple.png",
    "figure_confusion_matrix_methylation_rf_light_purple.png",
    "figure_threshold_tradeoff_light_purple.png",
    "figure_calibration_check_light_purple.png"))

write_csv(
  diagnostic_figure_manifest,
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "diagnostic_figure_manifest.csv"))

diagnostic_figure_manifest
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 12. Save diagnostic figure manifest
#--------------------------------------------------

diagnostic_figure_manifest <- tibble(
  figure = c(
    "Confusion matrix: Multiomic RF",
    "Confusion matrix: Methylation RF",
    "Threshold trade-off",
    "Calibration check"),
  file = c(
    "figure_confusion_matrix_multiomic_rf_light_purple.png",
    "figure_confusion_matrix_methylation_rf_light_purple.png",
    "figure_threshold_tradeoff_light_purple.png",
    "figure_calibration_check_light_purple.png"))

write_csv(
  diagnostic_figure_manifest,
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "diagnostic_figure_manifest.csv"))

diagnostic_figure_manifest
```
```{r}
p_age_survival <- clinical_master %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500), !is.na(age_at_index)) %>%
  mutate(
    survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = survival_500, y = age_at_index, fill = survival_500)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, width = 0.6, outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.8, colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "No" = "#111111",
      "Yes" = "#A78BFA")) +
  labs(
    title = "Age distribution by 500-day survival status",
    subtitle = "Clinical cohort profile after outcome construction",
    x = "Survival > 500 days",
    y = "Age at index",
    fill = "Survival > 500 days") +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_age_survival

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_age_by_survival_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_age_survival,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```
